title: デビュー戦の後に・Der Anfang

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That was a decent start, I believe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks troubled, but just as I'm about to ask
her what's wrong...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What'd you think of the racer who just
debuted in Kyoto the other day?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I think the sky's the limit for her! What about
you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It'd be an understatement to say I only have "high
hopes" for her! I've gotta say, this year's roster is
incredible. The Classics are going to be fun to
watch!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems there are many promising new racers this
year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm unsure that I can contend with them given my
current level of preparation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In order to achieve good results in the Classic
Triple Crown, I must—
choice_data_list:
Get a feel for your competition at the Keisei
Hai, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Right. Depending on my results, we may have to
adjust my training methods for the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing for me is completing
every race in the Classic Triple Crown. That's
everything to me.
